hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"cpp_onion: read CLAUDE.md. Cardinal rule: every field/point/engine/kernel change stays bit-exact vs libsodium (ctest -R xval / incremental) — never weaken a cross-check; every key passes the io::verify firewall before write. Keep 53/53 cpu + 56/56 cuda tests green. Never commit keys/ or device secret material."}}'

git -C "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '(src/|tests/)' && echo '{"systemMessage":"cpp_onion: code changed — keep tests green before finishing (ctest --preset debug = 53; ctest --preset cuda = 56) and confirm cross-validation vs libsodium still holds (ctest -R libsodium)."}' || true
